message.content: This section functions solely as a structural heading for the topic of "Core Combat and Gameplay Experience." It can answer high-level navigational questions regarding where combat mechanics and player experience are discussed within the document. The provided text contains no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed factual, procedural, or analytical questions. It serves exclusively as a topical marker for associated gameplay design content.
